instruction: Combine daily customer order data from Shopify and user engagement metrics from Klaviyo, ensuring that records are merged based on email, date, and attribution-related details (such as campaign, flow, and variation IDs) to create a unified view of customer activity across both platforms, including last touch information and source-specific data.
notes: Server holds the dbt project + DuckDB. Bridge does NOT transfer .duckdb files (large/binary). The model uses duckdb_tables.json as schema knowledge.
